title: centella linifolia
intro: Centella linifolia, also known as Indian pennywort or Marsh pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Centella linifolia include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting cardiovascular health and immune system function. Centella linifolia is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance overall well-being.
